_comment: Auto-repair fixture: stage 8b (git push rejected by protected-branch ruleset) failure at attempt 1. Stage 8b runs `git push -u origin <branch>` and the client's branch-protection ruleset can reject on required-signature / required-check / required-reviewer classes. fix-task.ts stage8Commit's push branch calls emitTrpJFailure with stage_label 'TRP8 push rejected' and the branch name in the FAILING_CMD.
